name: maquette
description: Image-guided website directions, brand kits, component contracts, and implemented pages

interface.shortDescription: Generate directions, brand kits, components, and pages with image-first QA
interface.longDescription: Create greenfield website directions, brand kits, reusable component libraries, and implemented pages through an image-guided, contract-first workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use $maquette to make a homepage for a fictional sparkling beverage brand called Fizz & Co. Start with a greenfield direction concept, then create the brand kit, critical components, and page.
Use $maquette-direction to explore homepage directions for a new AI note-taking product before creating its brand kit.
Use $maquette-brand-kit to create a brand kit for a boutique snack brand with a warm premium grocery feel.
Use $maquette-components to build a reusable component library from the existing approved Maquette brand kit.
Use $maquette-pages to create a pricing page from the existing approved Maquette brand kit and component library. Include plan cards, feature comparison, FAQs, and a clear upgrade path.
Use $maquette-pages to create a product listing page from the existing Maquette artifacts. Include filters, product cards, promo content, and a complete footer.
